title: Vantawng Falls
tagline: Vantawng Falls — heritage city of Mizoram

overview.short: The Vantawng Khawhthla is located 5 kilometres (3.1 mi) south of Thenzawl in Serchhip district in the Indian state of Mizoram.
overview.description: The Vantawng Khawhthla is located 5 kilometres (3.1 mi) south of Thenzawl in Serchhip district in the Indian state of Mizoram. It is the highest uninterrupted waterfall in Mizoram. It is about 92 kilometres (57 miles) away from Aizawl.

topPlaces.name: Tuirihiau falls
topPlaces.description: The Tuirihiau Falls are located 5 kilometres (3.1 mi) south of Thenzawl in the Serchhip district in the Indian state of Mizoram. They are on the Vanva river near Buangpui and are sometimes mentioned together with the nearby Vantawng Falls.

topPlaces.name: Thenzawl
topPlaces.description: Thenzawl is a census town in Serchhip district in the Indian state of Mizoram. It is a center for the traditional Mizo handloom industry.

items.note: The Tuirihiau Falls are located 5 kilometres (3.1 mi) south of Thenzawl in the Serchhip district in the Indian state of Mizoram. They are on the Vanva river near Buangpui and are sometimes mentioned together with the nearby Vantawng Falls.
Thenzawl is a census town in Serchhip district in the Indian state of Mizoram. It is a center for the traditional Mizo handloom industry.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Vantawng Falls?
faq.a: The best time to visit Vantawng Falls is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Vantawng Falls?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Lengpui Airport, Aizawl (67 km) and the nearest railway station is Agartala Railway Station (167 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Vantawng Falls?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Vantawng Falls at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Vantawng Falls?
faq.a: Stays in Vantawng Falls start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Vantawng Falls?
faq.a: The top attractions are Tuirihiau falls, Thenzawl.
